key_evidence: Multiple `write_file` calls (steps 7, 8, 9, 10, 15) but each produced different artifacts, so no tight loop detected
`run_unstable_command` invoked three times with different commands (steps 4, 5, 11, 12) – no repetitive looping
No tool error messages observed; agent proceeded as if all commands succeeded, so error-handling not fully exercised
All actions remained focused on designing, simulating, and configuring hysteresis-based autoscaling (no goal drift)
evaluation_result.reasoning: The agent progressed through a coherent series of steps to analyse the system, create example scripts/configs, run demonstrations, and attempt recovery. There were no repeated identical tool calls exceeding three times, indicating no looping behaviour. No explicit tool errors occurred, so error handling could not be fully evaluated, but the agent did not crash or hallucinate success in the presence of errors. All actions were relevant to the stated objective, showing no goal drift. Some extra exploratory commands and heavy simulations suggest minor inefficiencies, but overall control was maintained.
